name: Caldo Gallego
recipeIngredient: 1 Meaty ham bone or smoked-pork hock
6 small White potatoes, peeled and diced
1 bn Collards, mustard greens or spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse beans, cover with 6 cups of water in a large kettle, soak overnight.
2. When ready to cook, add additional 1 quart water to the beans.
3. Add salt pork and ham bone.
4. Bring to a boil. Cover, reduce heat and simmer about 2 1/2 hours or until beans are tender.
5. Add potatoes and collards or mustard greens (if using spinach, add later with chorizos). Simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Cut chorizos into 1-inch pieces. Add to beans and cook an additional 10 minutes.
7. Taste and add salt if necessary. If too salty, add additional water.
8. Remove ham bone. Cut off meat and return it to the stew.
9. Serve in soup bowls.
